rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"skipStateCheck is hardcoded to true when command is 'rerun', completely bypassing the already-completed state lock in cli.js","scope":"@kody-ade/engine/dist/bin/cli.js"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"state lock bypasses are implemented as guard conditions (skipStateCheck flag) rather than removing the lock check entirely","scope":"@kody-ade/engine/dist/bin/cli.js"}]}
